title: Modport interface field access via hierarchy fails

features.name: interface with modport declaration
features.description: Code should include an interface definition with a modport declaration that exports interface signals
features.snippet: interface bus_if(input logic clk); logic [7:0] data; modport slave(output data, input clk); endinterface

features.name: module with modport-typed port connection
features.description: Code should include a module that has a port typed to a modport of an interface
features.snippet: module slave(bus_if.slave bus); always_ff @(posedge bus.clk) bus.data <= 8'h5A; endmodule

features.name: hierarchical access to interface signal through modport instance
features.description: Code should include accessing an interface signal through module hierarchy where the interface is connected via modport
